name: Pumpkin Seed Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grease a baking sheet.
2. In a large saucepan, stir sugar over medium-low heat for 8-10 minutes until melted and dark golden brown. The sugar will look crumbly before melting.
3. Remove from heat; stir in remaining ingredients (remaining butter or margarine, vanilla extract).
4. Immediately pour the mixture onto the prepared baking sheet using a wide metal spatula. Press the mixture to about 1/3 inch thickness.
5. Let cool and harden completely.
6. Break into bite-sized pieces.
7. Store in an air-tight container with layers of wax paper. Keep at room temperature. Keeps for 6 weeks.
